strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title history is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level principal or strategy leadership
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no advanced degree or shipped AI products at scale

response.justification: The candidate brings broad full-stack and infrastructure experience with entrepreneurial open-source work and recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the profile reads as a hands-on senior/staff IC rather than a Director-level principal with a record of shaping cloud and AI strategy, advising strategic customers, or shipping recognized AI platforms.
